---
title: "HYP-0014 Three-Year Core Metals Flow-Filtered Residual Reversion"
format: html
---

## Status

Status: `invalid_data_construction`.

## Run

```bash
uv run python scripts/run_metals_flow_filtered_residual_strategy.py \
  experiments/HYP-0014-metals-flow-filtered-residual-reversion-3y/config.yaml
```

## Notes

This test keeps the HYP-0013 strategy definition unchanged and extends the
trade sample to three years for the liquid core metals only.

## Original Result Summary

- Primary bars: `242,162` complete `$250M` bars.
- Base-cost net log return: `3.6702`.
- Base-cost t-stat: `9.02`.
- Base-cost annualized Sharpe: `5.21`.
- Base-cost gross-to-cost ratio: `11.29x`.
- Three-times-cost net log return: `2.9571`.
- Three-times-cost gross-to-cost ratio: `3.76x`.
- Max drawdown: `-7.50%`.

## Audit Update

This result is invalidated by the HYP-0015 audit. The original runner built
returns from a mixed stream of outright contracts per root rather than from a
tradable active contract or roll-adjusted continuous mark. Reconstructed endpoint
diagnostics showed that about 85% of selected net PnL occurred on bars where at
least one root switched endpoint contract. The corrected HYP-0015 run uses
continuous 1-minute price marks and rejects the strategy after costs.
